channel.title: +00 Meta on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +00 Meta on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: 00 INTRODUCTION
item.description: One Vishnusharman, shrewdly gleaning All worldly wisdom’s inner meaning, In these five books the charm compresses Of all such books the world possesses And this is how it happened. In the southern country is a city called Maidens’ Delight. There lived a king named Immortal-Power. He was familiar with all the works treating of the wise conduct of life. His feet were made dazzling by the tangle of rays of light from jewels in the diadems of mighty kings who knelt before him.

item.title: Pub note
item.description: Ever since the dawn of civilisation, ever since man first realised the imperative need to know himself and, through that self-knowledge, to win friends and influence people so to secure his own happiness and well-being no less than those of his fellowmen, the Panchatantra stories have unfailingly offered him significant and dynamic aid. In terms of historical time, these stories have been current among the Indian populace for at least five thousand years, probably longer.

item.title: TRANSLATOR’S INTRODUCTION
item.description: I One Vishnusharman, shrewdly gleaning All worldly wisdom’s inner meaning, In these five books the charm compresses Of all such books the world possesses. *—*INTRODUCTION TO THE Panchatantra The Panchatantra contains the most widely known stories in the world. If it were further declared that the Panchatantra is the best collection of stories in the world, the assertion could hardly be disproved, and would probably command the assent of those possessing the knowledge for a judgement.
